lines.speaker: Finn
lines.text: Can I help you, Your Royal Highness?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please. What are you selling?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like living down here?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.text: A lot drier in the winter than it is above ground.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.text: Can I help you, Your Royal Highness?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like living down here?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.text: There's no rain or wind down here.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.text: Some of the dwarves say that there's water in the other caves, and one of them says he's seen monsters in there.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.text: I don't know, sorry. You'd better ask one of the dwarves about it.
